title: English 12 Argument and Persuasive Writing Comments
description: English 12 starter comment bank for argument and persuasive writing aligned to grades 11-12 2023 NJSLS-ELA references. These materials are teacher-editable starter review materials aligned to common high school ELA writing tasks and 2023 NJSLS-ELA references. They are not official state curriculum, not district grading policy, and not automatic evaluation.

categories.label: Style and Tone
categories.description: Reusable review items for style and tone.

categories.label: Revision Next Steps
categories.description: Reusable review items for revision next steps.

comments.label: Claim strength
comments.short_text: Your claim states a position the reader can follow, which helps the reader understand the work with precision and att....
comments.text: Your claim states a position the reader can follow, which helps the reader understand the work with precision and attention to complexity.
comments.follow_up_prompt: What is one place where you can strengthen claim?
comments.revision_action: Keep this claim move and apply it in another paragraph or section.

comments.label: Claim developing
comments.short_text: Your claim is on the right track, but it will be stronger if you make the position more specific and debatable.
comments.text: Your claim is on the right track, but it will be stronger if you make the position more specific and debatable.
comments.follow_up_prompt: What is one place where you can strengthen claim?
comments.revision_action: Make the position more specific and debatable.

comments.label: Counterclaim strength
comments.short_text: Your counterclaim acknowledges another point of view in a fair way, which helps the reader understand the work with p....
comments.text: Your counterclaim acknowledges another point of view in a fair way, which helps the reader understand the work with precision and attention to complexity.
comments.follow_up_prompt: What is one place where you can strengthen counterclaim?
comments.revision_action: Keep this counterclaim move and apply it in another paragraph or section.

comments.label: Counterclaim developing
comments.short_text: Your counterclaim is on the right track, but it will be stronger if you answer the opposing view with evidence instea....
comments.text: Your counterclaim is on the right track, but it will be stronger if you answer the opposing view with evidence instead of dismissal.
comments.follow_up_prompt: What is one place where you can strengthen counterclaim?
comments.revision_action: Answer the opposing view with evidence instead of dismissal.

comments.label: Evidence strength
comments.short_text: Your evidence uses evidence that fits the point being made, which helps the reader understand the work with precision....
comments.text: Your evidence uses evidence that fits the point being made, which helps the reader understand the work with precision and attention to complexity.
comments.follow_up_prompt: What is one place where you can strengthen evidence?
comments.revision_action: Keep this evidence move and apply it in another paragraph or section.

comments.label: Evidence developing
comments.short_text: Your evidence is on the right track, but it will be stronger if you choose evidence that is more direct or more fully....
comments.text: Your evidence is on the right track, but it will be stronger if you choose evidence that is more direct or more fully introduced.
comments.follow_up_prompt: What is one place where you can strengthen evidence?
comments.revision_action: Choose evidence that is more direct or more fully introduced.

comments.label: Reasoning strength
comments.short_text: Your reasoning explains why the evidence matters, which helps the reader understand the work with precision and atten....
comments.text: Your reasoning explains why the evidence matters, which helps the reader understand the work with precision and attention to complexity.
comments.follow_up_prompt: What is one place where you can strengthen reasoning?
comments.revision_action: Keep this reasoning move and apply it in another paragraph or section.

comments.label: Reasoning developing
comments.short_text: Your reasoning is on the right track, but it will be stronger if you spell out the connection between the evidence an....
comments.text: Your reasoning is on the right track, but it will be stronger if you spell out the connection between the evidence and the claim.
comments.follow_up_prompt: What is one place where you can strengthen reasoning?
comments.revision_action: Spell out the connection between the evidence and the claim.

comments.label: Organization strength
comments.short_text: Your organization guides the reader through the ideas in a logical order, which helps the reader understand the work ....
comments.text: Your organization guides the reader through the ideas in a logical order, which helps the reader understand the work with precision and attention to complexity.
comments.follow_up_prompt: What is one place where you can strengthen organization?
comments.revision_action: Keep this organization move and apply it in another paragraph or section.

comments.label: Organization developing
comments.short_text: Your organization is on the right track, but it will be stronger if you reorder or group ideas so each paragraph has ....
comments.text: Your organization is on the right track, but it will be stronger if you reorder or group ideas so each paragraph has a clear job.
comments.follow_up_prompt: What is one place where you can strengthen organization?
comments.revision_action: Reorder or group ideas so each paragraph has a clear job.

comments.label: Style and Tone strength
comments.short_text: Your style and tone matches language and tone to the task and audience, which helps the reader understand the work wi....
comments.text: Your style and tone matches language and tone to the task and audience, which helps the reader understand the work with precision and attention to complexity.
comments.follow_up_prompt: What is one place where you can strengthen style and tone?
comments.revision_action: Keep this style and tone move and apply it in another paragraph or section.

comments.label: Style and Tone developing
comments.short_text: Your style and tone is on the right track, but it will be stronger if you replace casual or vague phrasing with more ....
comments.text: Your style and tone is on the right track, but it will be stronger if you replace casual or vague phrasing with more precise academic language.
comments.follow_up_prompt: What is one place where you can strengthen style and tone?
comments.revision_action: Replace casual or vague phrasing with more precise academic language.

comments.label: Conclusion strength
comments.short_text: Your conclusion brings the piece back to its main point, which helps the reader understand the work with precision an....
comments.text: Your conclusion brings the piece back to its main point, which helps the reader understand the work with precision and attention to complexity.
comments.follow_up_prompt: What is one place where you can strengthen conclusion?
comments.revision_action: Keep this conclusion move and apply it in another paragraph or section.

comments.label: Conclusion developing
comments.short_text: Your conclusion is on the right track, but it will be stronger if you move beyond repeating the introduction by expla....
comments.text: Your conclusion is on the right track, but it will be stronger if you move beyond repeating the introduction by explaining why the idea matters.
comments.follow_up_prompt: What is one place where you can strengthen conclusion?
comments.revision_action: Move beyond repeating the introduction by explaining why the idea matters.

comments.label: Conventions strength
comments.short_text: Your conventions keeps sentence control from distracting the reader, which helps the reader understand the work with ....
comments.text: Your conventions keeps sentence control from distracting the reader, which helps the reader understand the work with precision and attention to complexity.
comments.follow_up_prompt: What is one place where you can strengthen conventions?
comments.revision_action: Keep this conventions move and apply it in another paragraph or section.

comments.label: Conventions developing
comments.short_text: Your conventions is on the right track, but it will be stronger if you edit sentence boundaries, punctuation, or usag....
comments.text: Your conventions is on the right track, but it will be stronger if you edit sentence boundaries, punctuation, or usage patterns that interrupt meaning.
comments.follow_up_prompt: What is one place where you can strengthen conventions?
comments.revision_action: Edit sentence boundaries, punctuation, or usage patterns that interrupt meaning.

comments.label: Revision Next Steps strength
comments.short_text: Your revision next steps identifies a useful next revision move, which helps the reader understand the work with prec....
comments.text: Your revision next steps identifies a useful next revision move, which helps the reader understand the work with precision and attention to complexity.
comments.follow_up_prompt: What is one place where you can strengthen revision next steps?
comments.revision_action: Keep this revision next steps move and apply it in another paragraph or section.

comments.label: Revision Next Steps developing
comments.short_text: Your revision next steps is on the right track, but it will be stronger if you choose one high-impact revision target....
comments.text: Your revision next steps is on the right track, but it will be stronger if you choose one high-impact revision target before editing smaller details.
comments.follow_up_prompt: What is one place where you can strengthen revision next steps?
comments.revision_action: Choose one high-impact revision target before editing smaller details.

comments.label: Claim hard to follow
comments.short_text: The claim is difficult to follow right now.
comments.text: The claim is difficult to follow right now. Revisit this part first so the reader can understand the purpose of the writing.
comments.teacher_note: Use when claim is a major barrier to understanding.
comments.follow_up_prompt: Where should the student begin revising claim?
comments.revision_action: Rewrite the section that most affects claim before polishing sentences.

comments.label: Counterclaim hard to follow
comments.short_text: The counterclaim is difficult to follow right now.
comments.text: The counterclaim is difficult to follow right now. Revisit this part first so the reader can understand the purpose of the writing.
comments.teacher_note: Use when counterclaim is a major barrier to understanding.
comments.follow_up_prompt: Where should the student begin revising counterclaim?
comments.revision_action: Rewrite the section that most affects counterclaim before polishing sentences.

comments.label: Evidence hard to follow

comments.label: Reasoning hard to follow

comments.text: The reasoning is difficult to follow right now. Revisit this part first so the reader can understand the purpose of the writing.

comments.label: Conventions next revision pass
comments.short_text: For the next revision pass, focus on conventions: Revise one moment so the explanation addresses significance, comple....
comments.text: For the next revision pass, focus on conventions: Revise one moment so the explanation addresses significance, complexity, or audience impact.
comments.follow_up_prompt: What single revision move would most improve conventions?
comments.revision_action: Make one focused pass for conventions and then reread the full piece.

comments.label: Revision Next Steps next revision pass
comments.short_text: For the next revision pass, focus on revision next steps: Revise one moment so the explanation addresses significance....
comments.text: For the next revision pass, focus on revision next steps: Revise one moment so the explanation addresses significance, complexity, or audience impact.
comments.follow_up_prompt: What single revision move would most improve revision next steps?
comments.revision_action: Make one focused pass for revision next steps and then reread the full piece.

module_details.notice: These materials are teacher-editable starter review materials aligned to common high school ELA writing tasks and 2023 NJSLS-ELA references. They are not official state curriculum, not district grading policy, and not automatic evaluation.
module_details.emphasis: precise and knowledgeable claims, significance, logical sequencing of claims and counterclaims, strongest relevant evidence, avoidance of fallacies, synthesis, sophisticated style, audience awareness, complexity, ambiguity, nuance, and independent revision.
